items.title: Lockheed's Q3 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Sales Increase Year Over Year
items.description: LMT tops Q3 estimates with higher segment sales and profit, boosting its 2025 earnings outlook amid solid backlog growth.

items.title: Lockheed Scores an Earnings Beat. It Wasn’t Enough for the Stock.
items.description: Lockheed Scores an Earnings Beat. It Wasn’t Enough for the Stock.

items.title: How GE Earnings Cleared a High Bar—and Sent the Stock Higher
items.description: How GE Earnings Cleared a High Bar—and Sent the Stock Higher

items.title: Northrop Grumman Q3 Earnings Top, Revenues Miss, '25 EPS View Raised
items.description: NOC's third-quarter earnings beat estimates as segment gains offset a sales miss. The company raises its full-year EPS outlook.

items.title: General Electric Raises Outlook on Jet Engine Boom
items.description: General Electric boosted its annual forecast for a second straight quarter as booming air travel drives demand for jet engines and repairs. Revenue surged 26% last quarter to $11.3 billion, helped by strong maintenance work and new engine deliveries to Boeing and Airbus. Bloomberg's Brooke Sutherland reports on the results.
